pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 11 and export_result.sh line 7 both define PROJECT_DIR="/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/ShopEasyApp"
export_result.sh line 8 defines ACTIVITY_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/app/src/main/java/com/example/shopeasy/DeepLinkActivity.kt"; setup_task.sh line 19 creates the directory structure
export_result.sh line 9 defines LAYOUT_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_deep_link.xml"; setup_task.sh line 20 creates the directory
export_result.sh line 10 defines MANIFEST_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml"; setup_task.sh line 94 creates this file
task.json description line 5 specifies android:host="shopeasy.example.com" for the deep link data element; verifier.py line 132 checks for android:host="shopeasy\.example\.com"
task.json description line 5 specifies android:pathPrefix="/product" for the deep link data element; verifier.py line 133 checks for android:pathPrefix="/product"

privileged_info_summary: The task 'add_deep_link_activity@1' is a synthetic Android Studio IDE task where the agent creates deep link support for a ShopEasy application. The project is created from scratch (no external dataset) at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/ShopEasyApp. The agent must create three components: (1) DeepLinkActivity.kt at app/src/main/java/com/example/shopeasy/DeepLinkActivity.kt extending AppCompatActivity with onCreate method, intent data extraction, and product ID extraction from URI path segment; (2) activity_deep_link.xml layout at app/src/main/res/layout/activity_deep_link.xml with at least one TextView; (3) update AndroidManifest.xml at app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml to register DeepLinkActivity with intent filter including ACTION_VIEW, BROWSABLE category, and data element configured with scheme="https", host="shopeasy.example.com", and pathPrefix="/product". The task verifies successful completion through file existence checks, XML validation, manifest configuration validation, and successful project build via Gradle.
